title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store offering donated clothing and household items. 2424 N Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thrift Store: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Clothing Vouchers: Thursday/Friday 10am-1pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-2pm Email (541) 779-3648 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-3648 Clothing Voucher (541) 772-3828 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Varies by item. Low-cost or free with voucher for clothing or household goods. Vouchers are available once every six months to housed clients and as needed to homeless clients, one set of clothes per month. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Services: Clothing Vouchers Household Goods Vouchers Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - DINING ROOM FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - ST ANTHONY EMERGENCY FAMILY SHELTER MATERIAL GOODS - SOCIAL SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - URBAN REST STOP UTILITIES - UTILITY AND RENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD
